title: Farmer tool-swap showcase
_doc: Single chapter. The farmer starts with sickle (in hand) plus canteen and torch in inventory; rifle is the only item that must be picked up off-screen. Hotkeys: 0 = swing sickle, W = equip rifle (swaps in for sickle), A = raise torch, S = drink from canteen, D = sling rifle on back (free hands), Space = ignite wheat. Tab cycles through all six in order.

chapters.world: A golden wheat field stretching to a distant horizon, scattered red poppies, a wooden fence line at the far edge.
chapters.character: A farmer in a loose linen shirt, brown trousers, and a straw hat, mid-swing with a curved iron sickle held in both hands, blade catching sunlight.
chapters.dynamics: Third-person side-on camera at chest height, midday sun overhead, light wind moving the wheat.
persistent_facts: Exactly one farmer is in this scene; never duplicate them. Tool changes swap only what is in their hands. Their straw hat, linen shirt, brown trousers, body, face, and stance remain the same farmer.
The wheat field, sky, fence line, and overall composition stay the same across tool changes. Only update what the farmer is holding and any explicit world_append additions.

triggers.prompt: the farmer swings the sickle and cuts down a swath of wheat, leaving fresh stubble
triggers.question: Has the wheat been freshly cut down to stubble where the farmer is standing?

effects.world_append: A patch of wheat at the farmer's feet is freshly cut down to golden stubble, severed stalks lying in piles.
effects.add_fact: Cut wheat lies in neat piles along the rows the farmer has worked.

triggers.prompt: the same farmer puts down the sickle and now holds a bolt-action rifle in its place; do not duplicate the farmer or change their clothing or face; the wheat field, sky, lighting, and camera stay exactly the same — only the object in their hands changes
triggers.question: Has the farmer just equipped a rifle?

effects.set_character: A farmer in a loose linen shirt, brown trousers, and a straw hat, shouldering a bolt-action rifle in firing stance, eye to the iron sights.

triggers.prompt: the same farmer now holds a flaming wooden torch raised overhead in one hand; do not duplicate the farmer or change their clothing or face; the wheat field, sky, lighting, and camera stay exactly the same — only swap what is in their hand to the torch
triggers.question: Has the farmer just equipped a flaming torch?

effects.set_character: A farmer in a loose linen shirt, brown trousers, and a straw hat, holding a flaming wooden torch raised overhead in one hand, ember sparks drifting.

triggers.prompt: the same farmer now holds a battered metal canteen up to their lips and drinks; do not duplicate the farmer or change their clothing or face; the wheat field, sky, lighting, and camera stay exactly the same — only swap what is in their hands to the canteen
triggers.question: Is the farmer drinking from a metal water canteen held up to their mouth?

effects.set_character: A farmer in a loose linen shirt, brown trousers, and a straw hat, holding a battered metal canteen up to their lips and drinking, head tilted slightly back.

triggers.prompt: the same farmer slings the rifle across their back on a leather strap so their hands are free at their sides; do not duplicate the farmer or change their clothing or face; the wheat field, sky, lighting, and camera stay exactly the same — only the object the farmer is holding moves to their back
triggers.question: Has the farmer slung the rifle across their back so their hands are free?

effects.set_character: A farmer in a loose linen shirt, brown trousers, and a straw hat, rifle slung across the back on a leather strap, both hands free and relaxed at the sides.

triggers.prompt: the torch ignites the dry wheat and fire begins to spread
triggers.question: Has fire begun spreading through the wheat?

effects.world_append: Fire is spreading in a curved front near the farmer, dark smoke rising and bending east with the wind.
effects.set_dynamics: Third-person side-on camera at chest height, midday sun overhead, light wind moving the wheat, fire glow casting amber rim light on the farmer.
